title: Kushikatsu Tempura with Lemon Dipping Sauce
description: A Japanese-inspired dish featuring crispy kushikatsu tempura and a refreshing lemon dipping sauce. This snack is perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Cut potatoes, cabbage, and carrots into 1-inch pieces.
In a bowl, mix flour and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, beat the egg.
Dip each vegetable piece first into the flour mixture, then into the beaten egg, and finally into the panko breadcrumbs.
Heat about 2-3 inches of oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Fry the breaded vegetables in batches until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Drain the kushikatsu tempura on paper towels.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and lemon zest to make the dipping sauce.
Serve the kushikatsu tempura hot with the lemon dipping sauce.
